q.en: In what country and year was Galileo born?
q.zh: 伽利略在哪个国家、哪一年出生？

explain.en: 'Galileo was born in Italy in 1564 during the Italian Renaissance.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“伽利略于1564年意大利文艺复兴时期出生在意大利。”

q.en: What observation about a chandelier led to Galileo's discovery about time?
q.zh: 关于吊灯，伽利略观察到了什么从而有了关于时间的发现？

options.en: Every swing, wide or narrow, took the same amount of time
options.zh: 无论摆幅大小，每次摆动用时都相同

options.en: It was made of gold according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它是金子做的（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: 'Although some swings were much wider than others, every swing took exactly the same amount of time,' leading him to design a clock using a swinging weight.
explain.zh: 书里说：“尽管有些摆动幅度大得多，但每次摆动用时完全相同”，这让他设计出用摆动重物计时的钟。

q.en: In the glossary, the word 'telescope' means—

options.en: a spyglass that makes distant objects look closer
options.zh: 让远处物体看起来更近的望远镜

options.en: a microscope according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 显微镜（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Glossary: 'telescope (n.) an instrument used to make distant objects look closer (p. 9).'
explain.zh: 词汇表：telescope 意为“让远处物体看起来更近的仪器（第9页）”。

q.en: What did Galileo build after hearing about the Dutch 'spyglass'?
q.zh: 听到荷兰“窥镜”后，伽利略制造了什么？

options.en: A printing press according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 印刷机（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A telescope that made objects look thirty times bigger
options.zh: 让物体放大三十倍的望远镜

explain.en: 'Soon he was able to make distant objects look thirty times bigger. He had built a telescope.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“很快他能让远处物体放大三十倍。他造出了一台望远镜。”

q.en: Which of these was NOT one of Galileo's astronomical discoveries?
q.zh: 以下哪一项不是伽利略的天文发现？

options.en: That Venus changes shape like the Moon
options.zh: 金星像月亮一样改变形状

explain.en: Galileo observed sunspots, Jupiter's four largest moons, and Venus's phases; he argued Earth moves around the Sun, not that Earth is flat.
explain.zh: 伽利略观测了太阳黑子、木星最大的四颗卫星和金星的相位；他主张地球绕太阳转，而非地球是平的。

q.en: Why did the Catholic Church put Galileo on trial in 1633?
q.zh: 天主教会为何在1633年审判伽利略？

options.en: His discoveries suggested Earth was not the center of the solar system, opposing Church teaching
options.zh: 他的发现表明地球并非太阳系中心，与教会教义相悖

options.en: He wrote in Italian according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book as mentioned in a later chapter
options.zh: 他用意大利文写作（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）（正如后文某一章提到的）

explain.en: 'The Catholic Church did not like his ideas... the Church had taught that the Sun, Moon, planets, and stars all moved around Earth,' and Galileo's proof opposed this.
explain.zh: 书里说：“天主教会不喜欢他的观点……教会一向教导日月行星星辰都绕地球转”，而伽利略的证据与之相悖。

q.en: What famous (though unproven) phrase is linked to Galileo's trial?
q.zh: 哪句著名（尽管未经证实）的话与伽利略的审判相关？

explain.en: 'A popular, but unproven, story says that Galileo... murmured, "And yet it moves" under his breath.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“一个流行但未经证实的故事称，伽利略……低声嘟囔了一句‘然而它仍在转动’。”

q.en: In what year did the Catholic Church formally clear Galileo of wrongdoing?
q.zh: 天主教会于哪一年正式为伽利略平反？

options.en: 1757 according to some versions of the story

explain.en: 'In 1992, the Church formally cleared Galileo of any wrongdoing.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“1992年，教会正式为伽利略平反，免除其一切过错。”

q.en: What is the book's focus question?
q.zh: 本书的焦点问题是什么？

options.en: Who invented the telescope? according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 谁发明了望远镜？（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: How do questions lead to new discoveries?

explain.en: The Focus Question at the start is 'How do questions lead to new discoveries?' and the book credits Galileo's questioning.
explain.zh: 开头的焦点问题是“问题如何带来新发现？”，全书归功于伽利略善于提问。

q.en: Why is Galileo called 'the father of modern science'?
q.zh: 伽利略为何被称为“现代科学之父”？

options.en: He built the first car according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他造出了第一辆汽车（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He was the first to describe laws of nature with math and use measurable data
options.zh: 他最先用数学描述自然规律并使用可测量数据

explain.en: 'He was the first to say that laws of nature could be described using math... one of the first scientists to insist on using measurable data... Today, we call him the father of modern science.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“他最先提出自然规律可用数学描述……也是最早坚持使用可测量数据的科学家之一……今天我们称他为现代科学之父。”

prompt.en: Draw a diagram of the solar system as Galileo observed it, including Venus's phases and Jupiter's four moons.
prompt.zh: 按伽利略的观测画一张太阳系示意图，包括金星的相位和木星的四颗卫星。

en: Show the Sun at the center with Earth and Venus orbiting it.
Sketch Venus as crescent, half, and full to show its phases.
zh: 把太阳画在中央，地球和金星绕其运行。
画出新月、半月、满月状的金星以展示其相位。
